steps.title: Substitute t = 0 into the function
steps.content:
At the surface of the sample, the depth is $t = 0$ millimeters.

Substitute into the function: $$f(0) = 500(0.5)^{0/12}$$ Simplify the exponent: $$f(0) = 500(0.5)^{0}$$ Any nonzero number to the power 0 equals 1: $$f(0) = 500 \cdot 1 = 500$$ That matches choice A — A is correct.
